name: io.github.gongahkia/sg-apis-mcp
title: Singapore Public Data
description: Official Singapore public-data MCP server for bounded workflow planning and direct sg_* access across SingStat, MAS, OneMap, URA, LTA DataMall, NEA, HDB, CEA, BCA, BOA, ACRA, PA, SportSG, ECDA, MSF, GeBIZ, MOE, MOH, HSA, SFA, NParks, PUB, MOM, STB, HLB, and data.gov.sg.
